# affected

> A standalone CLI that detects affected packages in your monorepo and runs commands only on changed packages. Zero config. ~5 MB binary. No runtime required.

## What it does

affected builds a dependency graph of your monorepo, diffs against your base branch using libgit2, traverses the graph in reverse to find all transitively affected packages, and runs any command (test, lint, build) only on those packages. Six steps, milliseconds.

## Key features

- Zero config: auto-detects your ecosystem from lock files
- ~5 MB Rust binary with no runtime dependencies (no Node.js, no JVM)
- 13 supported ecosystems
- Transitive dependency graph analysis
- Watch mode for local development
- CI integration with JUnit output and dynamic matrix support
- --explain flag to show why each package was affected

## Supported ecosystems

Cargo, npm, pnpm, Yarn, Bun, Go modules, Maven, Gradle, pip, Poetry, uv, Pipenv, Mix (Elixir)

## Install

Homebrew:
  brew install affected

Cargo:
  cargo install affected-cli

uv / pipx:
  uvx affected

GitHub Actions:
  - uses: Rani367/affected-action@v1

## Usage

  affected test --base main
  affected lint --base origin/main --watch
  affected build --base HEAD~1 --output junit

## Source

https://github.com/Rani367/affected
